about_me.title: About me
about_me.presentation: I'm Dante Orsetti, a full stack web developer from Villa Constitución, Argentina. I'm currently finishing my University Technician degree in Programming at UTN, with a focus on React for the frontend and C# with .NET for the backend. I've built real-world applications — from management systems to REST APIs — and I'm looking for my first professional opportunity to keep growing as a developer. I have an intermediate level of English and enjoy solving real problems with clean, practical code.

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: Have an idea or project in mind? Let's talk.

footer.rights: 2026 Portfolio developed by Dante Orsetti. All rights reserved.
